g.text: OUTSIDE VIEW - the always-on access layer
TAILSCALE NETWORK - the runners live in here

text.tspan: ONE per fleet. Hosted by Kestrel next to the Gateway;
you open it in a browser over the tailnet.
Reuses Core C#: WingmanService, SummaryBuilder, RecapGenerator.
Owns NO session state -> restart it all day, sessions survive.
The front door. Knows every Director on the network.
Discovery + read-aggregation ONLY - never carries terminals.
